title: Machine-Readable Graph Representations
purpose: Produce JSON graph representations of all architecture maps for machine consumption, querying, and future visualization tooling.
architectural_constraints: JSON graphs must use standard graph format (nodes + edges)
Graphs must include metadata: authority, version, ownership
Queryable by subsystem, event type, protocol, or state
acceptance_criteria: All graphs validate against graph schema
Nodes include id, type, authority, version
Edges include source, target, relationship type
Graphs are queryable by category and relationship
